content:
💡 Portpal | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Resolving and preventing 'address already in use' errors by providing developers with a clear, visual, and interactive way to see which processes are using specific network ports and to manage those processes.
✨ Key Features: • Real-Time Port Dashboard • One-Click Process Control (Kill/Restart) • Interactive Network Topology Visualization (D3.js) • System Tray Intelligence • Smart Process and Framework Detection
📖 Summary: PortPal is a native desktop application designed to help developers manage and monitor network ports on their machines. It provides a real-time dashboard to view port usage, identify processes, track network traffic, and visualize network topology, enabling quick resolution of port conflicts and process management.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
